data.body: AC amendment: Throttle handling in Step 2. When effective MAX_AGENTS < 7 (usage throttle), dispatch haiku agents serially (one at a time) rather than routing to FALLBACK. Apply the same ≥5/7 consensus rule regardless of serial vs parallel dispatch. Only route to FALLBACK=THROTTLED when MAX_AGENTS=0 (paused). AC: document this behavior in Step 2.
